title: melastoma sabahense
intro: Melastoma sabahense is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "Bunga Kasturi" in Malay, which translates to "fragrant flower." It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating wounds. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Melastoma sabahense are often brewed into teas or made into infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
